phases.name: Backend Refactor — Remove non-GGUF backends, add Gemma 4 support

tasks.description: Add DEFAULT_BUNDLED_GGUF constant and get_bundled_model_path() function to app_paths.py. The constant holds 'gemma-4-E2B-it-Q5_K_M.gguf'. The function searches for the default model first, then falls back to legacy paths (phi3-mini-int4.gguf, phi3.5-mini-instruct-int4-cw-ov, test_model.gguf). Covers FR-103.
tasks.acceptance: DEFAULT_BUNDLED_GGUF constant exists in app_paths.py; get_bundled_model_path() returns correct path for bundled model and legacy fallbacks

tasks.description: Remove OpenVINOLLM class (lines 83-144), OllamaLLM class (lines 305-403), and OpenAICompatibleLLM class (lines 406-517) from llm_interface.py. Then simplify SmartLLM (lines 551-733) to only support GGUFBackend — remove multi-backend fallback chain, Ollama/API parameters, and backend iteration loop. Covers FR-104, FR-105, FR-106, FR-107.
tasks.acceptance: No OpenVINOLLM, OllamaLLM, or OpenAICompatibleLLM class definitions remain; SmartLLM only uses GGUFBackend

tasks.description: Add Gemma 4 model detection to GGUFBackend in llm_interface.py. Check for 'gemma-4' or 'gemma_4' in model filename. When detected, add '<|think|>' token to the stop parameter in chat_complete() and generate() to suppress thinking mode for RAG use. Covers FR-108.
tasks.acceptance: Gemma 4 model detected by filename; <|think|> added to stop tokens; non-Gemma models unaffected

tasks.description: Remove online parameters from RAGEngine.__init__() and _init_llm() in rag_engine.py. Remove: ollama_model, ollama_url, api_url, api_model, device parameters. Covers FR-109.
tasks.acceptance: RAGEngine.__init__() no longer accepts ollama_model, ollama_url, api_url, api_model, or device; _init_llm() uses only GGUFBackend

tasks.description: Remove online parameters from engine_factory.py. In create_engine(), create_engine_from_settings(), and create_engine_from_env(): remove ollama_model, ollama_url, api_url, api_model params. Remove model_path backward-compat param and RAG_MODEL_PATH env var handling. Replace inline bundled model lists with get_bundled_model_path() from app_paths.py. Covers FR-110.

tasks.description: Remove --model-path, --ollama-url, --ollama-model, --api-url CLI arguments from main.py. Remove RAG_MODEL_PATH environment variable reading and passing. Covers FR-111.

tasks.description: Remove environment variable validations from api_server.py lifespan: RAG_MODEL_PATH, RAG_OLLAMA_MODEL, RAG_OLLAMA_URL, RAG_API_URL, RAG_API_MODEL, RAG_DEVICE. Remove model_path and device parameters from RAGEngine() construction at line 461. Covers FR-112.

tasks.description: Update requirements.txt: remove openvino and openvino-genai lines (lines 13-14), update llama-cpp-python constraint to >=0.2.30. Covers FR-201, FR-203.

phases.name: Resilience & Code Quality — Embedding hardening, lazy init, error handling

tasks.description: Harden EmbeddingModel in vector_store.py: always pass local_files_only=True to SentenceTransformer in both PyInstaller and dev mode; add ./models/bge-small-en-v1.5/ as secondary search path; raise clear FileNotFoundError with expected path when model not found. Covers FR-301, FR-302, FR-303.
tasks.acceptance: SentenceTransformer always called with local_files_only=True; secondary dev path checked; FileNotFoundError raised with message on missing model

tasks.description: Verify and implement lazy initialization in vector_store.py: check if BM25 index rebuild is already deferred (reality check suggests it may be); if not, defer _rebuild_bm25_index() to first bm25_search() call. Make SentenceTransformer lazy — load on first encode()/encode_single() call, not in __init__(). On BM25 failure, set empty BM25Index instance with warning. Add BM25 search failure logging. Move STOP_WORDS import to module level. Covers FR-501, FR-502, FR-604, FR-606, FR-804.
tasks.acceptance: BM25 index rebuilt on first search (or verified already lazy); SentenceTransformer loaded on first encode; BM25 failure produces warning not None; STOP_WORDS import at module level

tasks.description: Wrap LLM call in query_transformer.py in try/except. On failure, log warning and return original query unchanged. Replace all print() calls in llm_interface.py with logger.warning() or logger.info(). Covers FR-601, FR-602.
tasks.acceptance: query_transformer.py LLM call wrapped in try/except; llm_interface.py has zero print() calls (all replaced with logger)

tasks.description: Verify structured logging in document_processor.py (reality check suggests it may already exist). If adequate logging at document start/completion is present, mark FR-603 as already satisfied. If gaps exist, add structured logging with file name, chunk count, and duration. Covers FR-603.
tasks.acceptance: document_processor.py logs file name and chunk count at document processing start and completion; or verified already present

tasks.description: Add try/except wrappers in rag_engine.py: wrap reranker initialization with fallback to None + warning; wrap _save_config() with user-facing error message. Extract _log_init_banner() helper from __init__() to eliminate duplicated logger.info banner blocks. Gate query_transformer call on RAGConfig.query_transformation_enabled flag. Covers FR-605, FR-607, FR-802, FR-805.
tasks.acceptance: Reranker failure sets None with warning; save_config error shows user message; init banner extracted to helper; query_transformer gated on flag

tasks.description: Code quality fixes: extract _resolve_and_validate_path() helper in api_server.py to share duplicated path-resolution logic (FR-801); move 'from collections import defaultdict' import to module level in utils.py (FR-803); fix _SettingsProxy in config.py to wrap AttributeError with informative message (FR-806); simplify security.py URL validation to reject non-local URL schemes (FR-901). Covers FR-801, FR-803, FR-806, FR-901.
tasks.acceptance: api_server.py path validation uses shared helper; utils.py defaultdict import at module level; config.py SettingsProxy has informative AttributeError; security.py rejects non-local URLs

tasks.description: Defer _load_settings() in app_gui.py with self.after(50, self._load_settings_and_init) to allow first render before blocking I/O. Covers FR-503.
